sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ سَمِيرٌ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Samir je jutros otišao na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Samir went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: لَبِسَ قَمِيصًا أَبْيَضَ وَبَدْلَةً رَسْمِيَّةً أَنِيقَةً.
sentences.translation: Obukao je bijelu košulju i elegantno službeno odijelo.
sentences.translationEn: He wore a white shirt and an elegant formal suit.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ وَهُدُوءٍ.
sentences.translation: Na pitanja je odgovarao s velikim samopouzdanjem i smirenošću.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions with great confidence and calmness.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَنَّى سَمِيرٌ أَنْ يَحْصُلَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْوَظِيفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Samir se nada da će dobiti ovaj posao.
sentences.translationEn: Samir hopes to get this job.
